title: Stock List Automation

posts.author: Chris_E (Chris Earle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

The company I work for have a stock room we use for events (exhibitions/seminars) that we have added onto Monday.com as its own board.

We also have another board that we use to organise the events themselves, these boards have linked columns so that you can see how much is left of a particular item from the stock board when adding it to be sent to an event on the events board.

My question is would it be possible to have an automation that would remove the ‘quantity required’ amount from the linked ‘quantity in stock’ amount, activating when pressing the ‘check’ column on the items that has just been packed for an event from the stock room. We currently have an automation to alert us to know we are low on a certain item stock, however this would be a massive quality of life improvement if the items did not need manually removing and would subtract from the ‘quantity in stock’ amount when we tick the ‘check’ box.

I’ve been in contact with Monday support previously on this in November last year and there was no solution. Please let me know if there is a solution for this problem!

Many thanks,

Chris

Screenshot 2024-03-14 at 12.15.081315×406 53.6 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Chris,

I hear where you’re coming from and agree this flow would make things alot easier

At this time, I am afraid we do not have the support to integrate the check column to make automate this process, I am sorry for the setback! That said, can I ask if you could utilise a formula column to subtract the “quantity required” from the “quantity in stock” to get an instant indication of stock amount?

You could even set up conditional colouring as a visual indication of when stock is low.

Screen Shot 2024-03-20 at 10.40.04 am1600×1034 83.4 KB

Let me know what you think!
